name: Tartaglia
description:
Favorite babygirl ^-^

Updated to game version 5.3, without first message. I tried to make it lore accurate, but also tried to save tokens, so if there is something you want character to know - add it to the chat memory.

Reminder: if character is talking for you, answering repeatedly, or forgetting things often - that's an LLM issue, and there's nothing I can do about it. Try another LLM or change the generation settings.

--

Update 01/01/2025
Added a bit more info in personality, likes, dislikes, skills and abilities.
Added foul legacy info and life goal.
creator: mornkarno
